Per instructions, BE should exclude non-controlling interests when possible, so 'Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders' is preferred. 'Total Equity' is included only as fallback for years where the owner-only line may be unavailable. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
